## TRM1.2. Additional time in taxi-in phase (PI#5)

The additional time in Zurich in 2025 was equal to 1.54 min/arr.

The additional time in Geneva in 2025 was equal to 1.17 min/arr.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of this indicator across Member States in 2025 was 1.79 min/arr.
